title: Linked Inventory
description:
Linked Inventory is a Paper 1.21.1+ plugin where the entire server shares one single global inventory. Also adds a custom Item Stealer Mob
If any player dies, the shared inventory clears
body:
🌍 Linked Inventory

Everyone on the server uses one single inventory.

That means when someone:

• Picks up an item
• Drops an item
• Moves items
• Crafts items
• Equips armor
• Removes armor
• Swaps offhand

➡ It updates instantly for every player.

Everyone always sees the exact same inventory.

💀 One Death = Big Problem

If any player dies:

• The entire shared inventory gets cleared

Everyone instantly loses their items.

But don't worry:

• Items still drop on the ground
• If someone picks them up, they return to the shared inventory

So your team must recover the items together.

🧟 The Item Stealer

Watch out for a dangerous new mob.

Item Stealer

This is a special Wither Skeleton that steals your items.

Features:

• Slightly bigger than normal
• Wears full iron armor
• Holds a stone sword
• Spawns similar to witches
• 10% chance to replace baby zombies

🧲 Steals Your Items

When the Item Stealer hits a player:

• It steals 1 random item from the shared inventory
• Only 1 item from a stack is taken
• Cool magnetic swirl particles appear
• Sound effects play when the item is stolen

The mob keeps the stolen items.

⚔ Kill It To Get Items Back

When the Item Stealer dies:

• It drops all stolen items

If players pick them up → they return to the shared inventory.

⚡ Fast & Optimized

Inventory Chain is built to be fast and smooth.

Features:

• Instant inventory updates
• Anti-duplication protection
• Safe multi-player syncing
• Handles many players at once
• Very low server lag

💾 Automatic Saving

Your inventory is always saved.

• Saves when the server stops
• Loads when the server starts
• Items stay even if players leave

No database needed.

⚙ Simple Config

Example config:

item-stealer:
  enabled: true

Turn the Item Stealer mob on or off anytime.

🎮 Perfect For

Inventory Chain is great for:

• SMP challenge servers
• YouTube challenge videos
• Hardcore multiplayer runs
• Chaos survival gameplay
• Team survival worlds

📌 Requirements

• Minecraft 1.21.1+
• Paper / Paper forks
• Java 17+

✅ Easy to install
✅ Fun multiplayer chaos
✅ Unique gameplay experience

Join my discord server for plugin updates paid plugins free plugins and plugin related stuff!!:

https://discord.gg/RfXUTxpPht
